│                 /tmp/scratch_model                 │                                                                 │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯

 ⚠ 1 setup issue: MCP · /doctor

❯ /model
  ⎿  Set model to Sonnet 4.6 and saved as your default for new sessions

❯ /model

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Select model
  Switch between Claude models. Your pick becomes the default for new sessions. For other/previous model names,
  specify with --model.

    1. Default (recommended)  Opus 4.8 with 1M context · Most capable for complex work
  ❯ 2. Sonnet ✔               Sonnet 4.6 · Best for everyday tasks
    3. Haiku                  Haiku 4.5 · Fastest for quick answers

  ○ Low effort ←/→ to adjust

  Enter to set as default · s to use this session only · Esc to cancel
